news.headline: Hudson Pacific Properties (NYSE: HPP) to release Q2 results on August 7, 2024 after market close. Conference call at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Hudson Pacific Properties, Inc. (NYSE: HPP), a leading provider of real estate solutions for tech and media tenants, is set to unveil its second-quarter financial results on August 7, 2024, after the markets close. The company has scheduled a conference call on the same day at 2:00 p.m. PT / 5:00 p.m. ET for result discussions. For those interested in joining via phone, dial (833) 470-1428 and use passcode 550142. International participants can call (40...).

news.headline: Clearstory secures $16M Series B funding to grow its change order platform for construction industry, raising total capital to $35M. Led by Prudence.
news.summary: In Walnut Creek, California, Clearstory, a platform for communication regarding change orders in the construction industry, has reported the completion of a Series B financing round worth $16 million. This latest funding has pushed the total capital raised by the company to $35 million. The investment was spearheaded by Prudence, a venture firm focusing on technology companies at the forefront of reshaping the built environment globally. Additionally, Industry Ventures and previous investors also took part in this round.

news.headline: Survey by ARC shows 80% of Americans view manufacturing as vital to economy, 1,000 adults participated in the study.
news.summary: According to a survey by ARC (American Revitalization Company), 80% of Americans view manufacturing as crucial to the U.S. economy. The study, involving 1,000 U.S. adults, highlights a widespread belief in the importance of manufacturing within the country. This sentiment reflects a national preference for keeping manufacturing jobs within the U.S. and boosting domestic production.

news.headline: Austin Rabine is returning as CEO of SITE Technologies for growth; company had record sales year.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from SITE Technologies, a leading company in Asset Management and Data Analytics based in Chicago, it was revealed that Austin Rabine, the Co-founder and former CEO, will be rejoining the company to spearhead its direction in the upcoming phase of product development and substantial expansion. The decision comes on the heels of remarkable sales performance, marking a record-breaking year for the organization. Having previously served as the startup CEO during the formative stages of SITE, Rabine's reappointment signifies a strategic move fueled by his wealth of experience and strong commitment to leveraging innovative technologies to drive growth.

news.headline: Balfour Beatty earns LEED Gold certification for The Broadview at Vanderbilt student housing project, showcasing commitment to sustainability and energy efficiency.
news.summary: In MALVERN, Pennsylvania, Balfour Beatty Campus Solutions, a prominent developer and operator of college and university infrastructure projects, celebrates The Broadview at Vanderbilt receiving the esteemed LEED Gold Certification from the United States Green Building Council (USGBC). This recognition underscores Balfour Beatty Campus Solutions' dedication to sustainable development, energy efficiency, and environmental efforts. The project's highest rating acknowledges its adherence to green building standards and practices, further solidifying the company's commitment to eco-friendly initiatives.

news.headline: Populous chosen to design MLS NEXT Pro Stadium in Albany by Business for Good Co-Founders and investors.
news.summary: In Albany, New York on June 27, 2024, the Co-Founders of Business for Good, Ed and Lisa Mitzen, along with investors such as real estate developers Jeff Buell and Chris Spraragen, and professional soccer coach Steve Freeman, have revealed the hiring of Populous for their latest project.

news.headline: Jones Soda releases HD-9 Shooters, meeting demand for mini drinks, expands into new beverage format. #JonesSoda #JSDA #PRNewswire
news.summary: Jones Soda has introduced a new brand, Crossover HD-9, to cater to the rising demand for mini drinks. The company, famous for its exceptional taste and unique flavors, aims to expand its presence in this emerging category. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024, in Seattle. Jones Soda Co. is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange as JSDA and on the OTCQB market also as JSDA. This strategic move showcases the company's commitment to meeting consumer needs while capitalizing on market trends, marking a new chapter in its brand evolution.

news.headline: 73% of health care workers surveyed see disparities in care for BIPOC patients, per National Medical Fellowships study.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Alexandra, Virginia, a recent survey conducted by National Medical Fellowships (NMF) revealed that approximately 75% of healthcare workers observed discrepancies in the treatment provided to patients of color. This exploratory research sheds light on the pervasive issue of inequality within the healthcare system.

news.headline: NTSB upset with Boeing for revealing details on 737 Max probe; mishandled info on Alaska Airlines panel blowout.
news.summary: According to a report by the National Transportation Safety Board, Boeing allegedly disclosed incorrect details concerning the rupture of a panel during an Alaska Airlines flight.

news.headline: Mavenir, VIAVI, and CableLabs complete 3GPP Security Assurance Testing for RU, DU, and CU in 2024 O-RAN PlugFest.
news.summary: In Richardson, Texas, Mavenir has announced the successful completion of 3GPP Security Assurance Testing for the Radio Unit (RU), Distributed Unit (DU), and Centralized Unit (CU) in collaboration with VIAVI and CableLabs. This achievement showcases Mavenir's commitment to ensuring the security of their equipment in compliance with industry standards.

news.headline: Render Networks partners with Safe Software to enhance construction management with advanced data integration, leveraging FME processes.
news.summary: Render Networks has recently entered into a service partnership with Safe Software in Denver. With this collaboration, Render aims to enhance its digital construction management platform by incorporating advanced data integration and transformation capabilities provided by Safe Software's Feature Manipulation Engine (FME) processes. By leveraging this partnership, Render will be able to offer its customers enhanced solutions, resulting in more efficient project deliveries. This collaboration signifies Render's commitment to providing cutting-edge services in construction management.

news.headline: Mythic appoints Dr. Taner Ozcelik as CEO to expand AI inference market, leveraging analog compute-in-memory technology for energy efficiency and cost savings.
news.summary: In Austin today, semiconductor company Mythic announced Dr. Taner Ozcelik, former NVIDIA automotive division founder and VP & GM, as its new CEO. Ozcelik will spearhead Mythic's advancement in AI processing with its analog compute-in-memory technology, aiming to tap into untapped AI inference markets. Currently, AI inference is limited to expensive applications due to digital computing's memory and energy constraints. Mythic is poised to disrupt this space with its innovative product.

news.headline: Chad Bennett joins Teradata as SVP in Investor Relations and Corporate Development, was with Craig-Hallum Capital.
news.summary: In San Diego, a recent news release stated that Bennett, previously employed by Craig-Hallum Capital as a Senior Vice President/Partner in Equity Research, has joined a new company. He brings a wealth of experience from his previous role and is expected to contribute significantly to the new organization.

news.headline: "Luigi’s Mansion 2 HD out now for Nintendo Switch, help Luigi with Poltergust 5000 to restore Dark Moon."
news.summary: In Redmond, Washington, this week's Nintendo Download features new content available on the Nintendo eShop for the Nintendo Switch. Gamers can now enjoy Luigi’s Mansion 2 HD, where they help Luigi tame unruly ghosts and restore the Dark Moon. This game allows players to explore various haunted mansions and utilize the Poltergust 5000 to capture ghosts and explore every corner of these spooky yet endearing locations. This addition aims to provide an engaging experience for players on the go.

news.headline: Relm Insurance partners with SideChannel for cybersecurity; enhances protection for clients in innovative industries.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on June 27, 2024, a notable collaboration was announced between Relm Insurance, a top specialty insurance carrier for innovative industries, and SideChannel, a leading cybersecurity services and technology provider. The partnership aims to enhance support for emerging sectors.

news.headline: Box Inc. enhances Box AI for Intelligent Content Management with unlimited end user queries for Enterprise Plus customers. New features include integration with GPT-4o, support for image and spreadsheet files, and Box AI for Metadata API.
news.summary: In California, Box, Inc. (NYSE: BOX) revealed that on its Enterprise Plus plan, customers will now have unrestricted end user queries in Box AI for Hubs, Documents, and Notes. Additionally, Box introduced fresh features in Box AI, such as integration with GPT-4o, backing for image and spreadsheet files, and the Box AI for Metadata API. The company emphasizes that artificial intelligence signifies a critical transformation in how businesses interact with their content, empowering organizations to leverage the potential of AI to enhance their operations significantly.

news.headline: Men's Wearhouse offers 25% discount to military personnel, families at all stores from June 29 to July 6. HOUSTON, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In honor of military personnel, Veterans, and their families, Tailored Brands will be hosting its inaugural Military Appreciation Week from June 29 to July 6. This event offers a substantial 25% discount at all Men's Wearhouse, Jos. A. Bank, and Moores store locations. To avail of this special discount, individuals must present a valid military ID for verification. This initiative by Tailored Brands aims to show gratitude and support for those who have served in the armed forces. The promotion is scheduled to take place nationwide and seeks to benefit a significant number of military-affiliated individuals.

news.headline: Central Maine Community College partners with FBA to train fiber technicians through OpTIC Path program to connect communities.
news.summary: The Fiber Broadband Association (FBA) has revealed that the Optical Telecom Installer Certification (OpTIC Path™) program is now open to residents in Maine via Central Maine Community College (CMCC). This course aims to equip individuals with the necessary skills to become proficient fiber technicians, essential for growing local networks and providing high-speed fiber broadband services to communities in Maine. Graduates of the OpTIC Path program will also benefit from promising prospects in the field, facilitating their entry into this growing industry.

news.headline: Crocs, Inc. releases 2023 Comfort Report, detailing efforts for a more comfortable world, with focus on bio-circular materials and end-of-life solutions. BROOMFIELD, Colo., June 27, 2024.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the advancements made by Crocs, Inc. (NASDAQ: CROX) in their journey towards achieving key milestones. The company, based in Broomfield, Colorado, has made significant progress in the innovation of bio-circular materials and end-of-life solutions as part of their ambitious initiatives. These developments signify the company's commitment to sustainability and corporate responsibility. The report indicates substantial growth and showcases the dedication of Crocs, Inc. in driving forward their innovative practices.

news.headline: Zilliant hires 3 new executives to enhance pricing expertise, focusing on CPQ processes for manufacturing and distribution.
news.summary: Today, in Austin, Texas, Zilliant, a prominent figure in pricing lifecycle management for businesses, disclosed the addition of three key executives to its leadership team. Russ Halvorson has been appointed as the global head of sales engineering, Bob Pedersen will serve as the head of North America sales, and Matt Hobbs will take on the role of strategic account executive. These strategic hires were made to enhance Zilliant's expertise in configure, price, and quote (CPQ) processes, catering specifically to the needs of the manufacturing and distribution industries. This move follows Zilliant's recent momentum, solidifying its position as an industry leader.

news.headline: Zimperium appoints Michael Williams as new CMO with over 2 decades in cybersecurity marketing.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Zimperium, a prominent figure in mobile security, proudly revealed the selection of Michael Williams as the company's latest Chief Marketing Officer (CMO). Possessing a remarkable track record of more than twenty years in cybersecurity marketing, Michael is set to bring his expertise to this role.

news.headline: Payroll Integrations report shows 72% of workers disagree with employers' efforts on financial wellness.
news.summary: A technology company in San Diego, Payroll Integrations, has recently unveiled the initial segment of its 2024 State of Employee Financial Wellness Report. The report sheds light on a discrepancy between employers' perception of their role in supporting employees' financial well-being and how supported employees actually feel. Surprisingly, only 49% of employers think they are fully supporting their employees in this aspect. This report is the first in a two-part series focusing on benefit automation and reimagining ways to enhance employees' financial wellness.

news.headline: TEDCO awards funding to 18 projects in Maryland Makerspace Initiative Program for growth and development in 2024.
news.summary: The 2024 Maryland Makerspace Initiative Program, also known as the Makerspace Program, has selected 18 projects to receive funding in Columbia, Md. TEDCO, Maryland's economic driver for technology firms, announced the awardees on June 27, 2024. The funding will support the growth and development of these projects, showcasing TEDCO's commitment to fostering innovation and entrepreneurship in the state.

news.headline: Comtech launches SmartAssist, an AI-enabled public safety solution to answer low-priority calls, reducing burden on ECCs and PSAPs. #CMTL
news.summary: In Chandler, Arizona, on June 27, 2024, Comtech (NASDAQ: CMTL) introduced SmartAssist™, an AI-powered solution that addresses low-priority non-emergency calls without the need for a telecommunicator. This technology aims to support Emergency Communications Centers and Public Safety Answering Points by utilizing AI chatbots to manage call and Internet of Things device volumes. SmartAssist serves as a tool to aid in the efficient handling of inquiries and is part of Comtech's commitment as a global technology leader in improving emergency response systems.

news.headline: Branded Legacy, Inc. partners with Hemp Emu for CBD manufacturing, OTC.PK: BLEG, boosting wellness product line.
news.summary: In Melbourne, Florida, on June 27, 2024, it was announced that Branded Legacy, Inc. (OTC.PK: BLEG), a prominent wellness products manufacturer, has formed a strategic partnership with Hemp Emu, a well-known supplier of top-quality CBD products. This partnership is a significant development for Branded Legacy, as it marks an exciting opportunity for growth and expansion in the CBD market.

news.headline: MDP invests in Omni Federal, a high-growth software provider to DoD and Intelligence Community. MDP raised over $31B since 1992.
news.summary: Chicago-based private equity firm Madison Dearborn Partners (MDP) has disclosed a strategic investment in Omni Federal, a fast-growing company offering mission and enterprise software solutions to the U.S. Department of Defense and Intelligence. Since 1992, MDP has amassed over $31 billion in capital. Omni, led by its founder, specializes in serving government agencies and has caught the eye of MDP for its innovative approach. This investment signifies MDP's confidence in Omni's potential for expansion in the federal sector.

news.headline: Alveo Technologies unveils Flockscreen LAMP test for avian flu, can detect virus in cloacal and oropharyngeal samples.
news.summary: A breakthrough product, Flockscreen, was created by Alveo Technologies in collaboration with x-Ovo, Royal GD, and Pharmsure. The first shipments of Flockscreen to the Europe, Middle East, and Africa region are anticipated in the third quarter of 2024. Headquartered in Alameda, California, the company behind this innovation, Alveo Technologies, Inc. (Alveo), is known for its expertise in molecular sensing.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer's Legisway solution wins "Best Work Management Platform" at the SIIA CODiE Awards.
news.summary: In New York, it was announced that Wolters Kluwer's Legisway solution earned the title of "Best Work Management Platform" at the 39th annual SIIA CODiE Awards. This recognition highlights Legisway's innovative features and capabilities in the realm of work management.

news.headline: Thunderbird sells catalogue programs in scripted, kids, and unscripted genres; including Season 1 of "Kim's Convenience" to Fuse Media.
news.summary: Thunderbird Distribution, a part of Thunderbird Entertainment Group, has recently achieved significant success in selling a variety of catalogue titles in scripted, kids and family, and unscripted genres. One of the highlights includes the sale of season one (13 episodes of 30 minutes) of the popular comedy series Kim’s Convenience to Scripted Fuse Media for broadcasting on its U.S. linear channel. Additionally, Encore Airlines has acquired season 5 (13 episodes of 30 minutes) of the same series. These deals reflect the growing success of Thunderbird Distribution as it continues to expand its reach in the entertainment industry.

news.headline: Rebellious Wines launches scholarship for underrepresented students for post-secondary technical programs in the US.
news.summary: The Scholarship Program known as Rebellious Riveters is focused on empowering students through providing financial aid for tuition in post-secondary technical programs throughout the United States. This initiative, announced on June 27, 2024, in Purchase, N.Y., aims to support individuals pursuing education in technical fields. Additionally, Rebellious Wines, originating from California, echo this ethos of being non-conformist and breaking norms. This program is set to make a significant impact on the educational path of students, offering a valuable opportunity in a time when tuition costs continue to rise.

news.headline: BTIS uses Gradient AI to enhance risk assessment in workers' comp insurance, boosting pricing accuracy.
news.summary: In Boston, BTIS has announced their adoption of Gradient AI's underwriting solution to enhance risk prediction and pricing accuracy for workers' compensation policies. This move aims to leverage advanced technology to improve underwriting practices.

news.headline: Caldera Medical sponsors Cynisca Cycling Team to promote women's health and empowerment. Shows commitment to female athletes.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Caldera Medical, a prominent player in women’s pelvic health, has revealed its sponsorship of the Cynisca Cycling team. This move underscores Caldera Medical's steadfast dedication to enhancing women's health and empowerment through sports and community involvement. The Cynisca Cycling team, a top-tier professional women's cycling group, is focused on uplifting female athletes and advocating for gender equality in sports. This partnership with Caldera Medical, a renowned company in the field, signifies a significant step towards supporting female athletes and promoting gender parity in the sports realm.

news.headline: MicroStrategy equips enterprises to integrate AI-driven data insights into any app in their latest release.
news.summary: In Tyson's Corner, Virginia, MicroStrategy has become the pioneer in allowing businesses to incorporate AI-generated data insights into any web or mobile application. This innovation marks a significant advancement in the industry, with MicroStrategy leading the way in providing this groundbreaking technology to enterprises.

news.headline: Soundwall Music Camp has a new director, Adam Schuman, for their upcoming 2024 camp session from July 21-26 at UC Santa Cruz, following the passing of John Xepoleas, who was the director for ten years.
news.summary: A music camp in Santa Cruz, California, known as Soundwall Music Camp and founded in 1993, has appointed Adam Schuman as its new Camp Director. The camp's upcoming session is scheduled from July 21 to July 26 at the University of California, Santa Cruz. Schuman, a seasoned musician and educator, assumed the role following the passing of John Xepoleas, who held the position for a decade.

news.headline: Trupanion launches pet health podcast, Radio Trupanion, with expert vets and data insights for pet parents.
news.summary: A new podcast, Radio Trupanion, has been launched by Trupanion (Nasdaq: TRUP), a top provider of medical insurance for pets. The podcast aims to assist pet parents in budgeting and caring for their pets effectively. By combining insights from Trupanion’s truInsights initiative and input from renowned veterinarians, each episode will offer valuable education to listeners. The focus of upcoming episodes will be on providing data-driven information and expert advice to pet owners.

news.headline: Tranont introduces three full-spectrum hemp products for holistic wellness: Relax, Repair, and Restore. Launch in Utah.
news.summary: Tranont, based in Lehi, Utah, has announced the launch of three new full-spectrum hemp products, namely Relax, Repair, and Restore. The company is thrilled to introduce these products to its lineup, catering to a wide range of customer needs.

news.headline: Baskin-Robbins brings back Beach Day™ flavor after demand, available July 1st, partnered with Hunter McGrady.
news.summary: In Canton, Mass., Baskin-Robbins is reintroducing the popular Beach Day™ flavor due to high demand. Starting July 1, Beach Day™ ice cream will be available nationwide as the Flavor of the Month, alongside new offerings like the Beach Day™ Shake, Beach Day™ Sundae, and Pre-Packed Quart. Partnering with model Hunter McGrady, Baskin-Robbins aims to celebrate the occasion with a surge of flavor for its Beach Day™ Baddies fans.

news.headline: Gong cha partners with SID Tea LLC for 30 unit expansion in Puerto Rico with experienced franchise operators.
news.summary: In Boston, Gong cha, a leading bubble tea brand, has recently signed a significant development agreement with SID Tea LLC for 30 new units. This marks a considerable expansion for the brand, which boasts nearly 2,200 locations across 24 countries worldwide. SID Tea LLC, led by experienced QSR franchisors like Jose Vazquez, is set to spearhead this growth. Vazquez, a former VP of the Puerto Rico Chamber of Commerce and ex-President of ASORE, the Puerto Rico Restaurant Association, brings valuable expertise to this partnership. This agreement follows Gong cha's successful entry into the Puerto Rico market.

news.headline: Trex releases 2023 Sustainability Report showing financial strength and commitment to sustainability. #Trex #Sustainability #BusinessWire
news.summary: Trex Company, Inc. (NYSE:TREX), a prominent producer of low-maintenance composite decking and railing along with other outdoor living goods, has released its latest Sustainability Report titled "Seeing More Value in Sustainability." The report showcases the company's dedication to sustainability over three decades. The financial results for 2023 highlight the robustness of the Trex brand, the loyalty of its customer community, and the enduring appeal of its product line. This underscores the company's commitment to eco-friendly practices and its continued success in the market.

news.headline: Faropoint closes Urban Industrial Value Fund III with $915M, surpassing $750M target and attracting global investors.
news.summary: HOBOKEN, N.J.-- Faropoint, a prominent US industrial real estate investment manager, has recently completed the final close of its primary fund, Industrial Value Fund III. The fund attracted a total of $915 million in commitments, surpassing its initial target of $750 million. Noteworthy investors from North America, Europe, and the Middle East, such as public pension plans and insurance companies, have contributed to the fund, highlighting Faropoint's exceptional market standing and past performance. This achievement marks a significant success for Faropoint in the competitive asset management sector.

news.headline: Zelestra launches new brand, specializing in renewable energy using solar, wind, batteries, and green hydrogen.
news.summary: In Madrid, a client-centric renewable energy company called Zelestra has unveiled its new brand. Zelestra utilizes various technologies such as solar, wind, batteries, and green hydrogen for power generation and storage to propel the energy transition. Transitioning from a centralized renewable developer to a customer-focused global platform, Zelestra offers decarbonization solutions. Supported by EQT, a major private equity firm, Zelestra aims to drive the shift towards renewable energy.

news.headline: Animated film '47' about a man with Down syndrome wins Silver Film Lion at Cannes Lions fest, to be screened at NYC event.
news.summary: In New York, Paris, and Sao Paulo, an inspirational animated short film titled ‘47’ has been making waves after winning the prestigious Silver Film Lion and three additional awards at the recent Cannes Lions Festival of Creativity. The film tells the touching story of Robert, a man with Down syndrome who secured his first job at the age of 47, showcasing the incredible journey of resilience and determination. Tonight, a special fundraising screening event will be held at the French Embassy’s Villa Albe to celebrate the success of the film. This heartwarming tale has captured the hearts of many, shedding light on the importance of perseverance and the beauty of overcoming obstacles.

news.headline: Responsible Flushing Alliance promotes smart flushing habits at VidCon Anaheim 2024 to raise awareness. #DoNotFlush #FlushSmartMonth
news.summary: In Anaheim, California, the Responsible Flushing Alliance (RFA) is gearing up for Flush Smart Month, which kicks off on July 1. To promote smart flushing habits, the RFA is utilizing a unique approach at VidCon Anaheim 2024. The event, taking place from June 26-29, gathers thousands of content creators at the city's convention center for four days of creativity and content creation. The RFA has integrated a new activation into the mix to capture creators' interest and increase awareness as part of its #FlushS campaign. This initiative aims to educate individuals about the proper disposal of items and highlight the importance of responsible flushing practices.

news.headline: Motorola Solutions introduces VESTA NXT, AI-powered 9-1-1 software reducing call handler workload by 20-35%.
news.summary: Motorola Solutions introduced VESTA NXT, advanced 9-1-1 software, designed to improve call handler productivity while minimizing stress. The innovative technology includes a virtual assistant powered by AI to handle non-emergency calls and direct individuals to appropriate support services. This can potentially reduce a call handler’s responsibilities by 20-35%, enhancing efficiency. VESTA NXT integrates essential information such as maps, floor plans, and caller details to streamline emergency response operations.

news.headline: OnePlus Ace 3 Pro features Pixelworks visual processor for enhanced mobile gaming experience. - PRNewswire, June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Leading visual processing solutions provider Pixelworks, Inc. (NASDAQ: PXLW) revealed an improved rendering acceleration solution on June 27, 2024, in Shanghai. The enhancement aims to deliver a more engaging and cooler high-frame-rate visual experience for consumers. This innovation was announced alongside the launch of the latest OnePlus product.

news.headline: e-Zinc secures $31M in funding for pilot manufacturing facility and commercial pilot projects for its energy storage system.
news.summary: A battery technology company based in Toronto, e-Zinc, has recently announced securing $31 million in funding. This investment will be utilized to finalize the construction of its pilot manufacturing facility and launch commercial pilot projects for its long-duration energy storage system.

news.headline: GigaMedia Limited announced successful results at its Annual General Meeting on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, GigaMedia Limited (NASDAQ: GIGM), a provider of digital entertainment services, disclosed that during its Annual General Meeting held on the same day, all resolutions outlined in the Notice of AGM dated were successfully passed. No specific details on the resolutions were provided in the brief.

news.headline: Plastic Compounds Market to reach $97.3 billion by 2029, growing at 6.6% CAGR, driven by packaging & construction industries.
news.summary: The Global Plastic Compounds Market is expected to grow from USD 70.8 billion in 2024 to USD 97.3 billion by 2029, with a projected CAGR of 6.6%. This growth is driven by increased demand from industries like packaging and building & construction, which rely heavily on plastic compounds for their advantageous properties. The market study by MarketsandMarkets™ identifies key players like BASF SE, Dow Chemical Company, and SABIC in the industry. The study also highlights drivers (increased demand in packaging and building & construction), restraints (volatility in raw material prices), opportunities (advancements in additive manufacturing), and challenges (plastic waste management crisis) in the market. Key findings include the expected growth of Polyamide (PA) and bio-based segments, with PP commanding the largest market share globally. The market is segmented into various products such as PVC, PE, PP, PS, PA, PC, PET, PU, ABS, and others. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Verdantas Flow Labs created by Alden Research Lab & Clemson Eng Hydraulics to offer cutting-edge fluid dynamics solutions.
news.summary: A prominent environmental science, engineering, and consulting firm, Verdantas, has introduced Verdantas Flow Labs in Tampa, Florida. This new venture is a result of a partnership between Alden Research Laboratory, LLC (Alden) and Clemson Engineering Hydraulics, LLC (CEH), renowned internationally. The collaboration combines the expertise of both hydraulics laboratories under a single entity, emphasizing their commitment to providing exceptional services. This initiative aims to leverage the unique capabilities of the laboratories to enhance their offerings and reach a wider audience.

news.headline: Hoodie receives $5M to enhance its cannabis market intelligence platform for brands and operators.
news.summary: Hoodie Analytics, a prominent cannabis data and technology firm headquartered in the United States, has recently announced a significant capital infusion to further enhance the development of its market intelligence platform. This platform is known for providing brands and operators with CPG-level analytics capabilities, aiding them in making informed decisions. The capital injection is expected to support the company's growth and innovation efforts in the industry. The announcement was made in Chicago on June 27, 2024.
